function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0002
alias: northstar_backfill_beta
issued_on: 2025-12-02
total_eur: 770
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 480
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar workflow review invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0002                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_beta       |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-02                    |
| total_eur      | 770                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 2   | 240      | 480      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 770      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A slightly later invoice where the prototype review started taking more of the effort mix.

next_step.current_state: Invoice updated successfully with schema-shaped frontmatter while preserving note body. Per inbox workflow, delete completed inbox item, then report completion.
All required work completed: bootstrapped identity, read applicable workflows/rules, updated invoice, deleted processed inbox item. Ready to report completion.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by adding YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md using only visible invoice data, preserving the existing note body, and then deleting the completed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap sequence, read nested AGENTS.MD files before working in each folder, inspected 99_system and used the inbox-processing, migration, and finance schema docs. Treated the inbox item as a request, verified the target note directly, kept the diff focused, preserved the note body, and deleted the inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The invoice note itself showed all schema-required visible fields for an invoice: record_type, invoice_number, alias, issued_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, and ordered line items, plus optional related_entity. The applicable workflow docs explicitly direct adding YAML frontmatter to the existing note, preserving the body, and deleting the inbox item after successful completion.
